summary: A Go-based monolithic CLI tool featuring an assertion runner and MCP handlers, heavily exercised through automated agent-generated test suites.
concerns: high volume of agent-generated extra test files suggests fragile test coverage
untracked file in git status indicates incomplete commit hygiene
recent binary rename (SmokeSig) may cause lingering references or broken integrations
scattered test directories across GOrchestra/glm-agents paths imply complex external orchestration
suggestions: consolidate or clean up the numerous agent-generated extra test files
resolve the untracked file and stabilize the repository state
verify all references are updated post-SmokeSig rename
review runner and MCP handler logic for production readiness
